sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102134" key="tablio/ph" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταβλ-ιόπη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, comic word, formed after <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Καλλιόπη</foreign>, <sense id="n102134.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a game at dice,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.373</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
